scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @pcr/domain && npm run build --workspace @pcr/config && npm run build --workspace @pcr/validation && npm run build --workspace @pcr/templates && npm run build --workspace @pcr/testing && npm run build --workspace @pcr/ui
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace @pcr/web && npm run build --workspace @pcr/api && npm run build --workspace @pcr/ai-worker && npm run build --workspace @pcr/pdf-worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.test:run: npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules
scripts.test:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,storage --config infrastructure/firebase/firebase.json "vitest run --config vitest.emulator.config.ts"
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:run && npm run build && npm run verify:dist
